scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix packages/backend" "npm run dev:ready --prefix packages/frontend"
scripts.test: npm test --prefix packages/frontend && npm test --prefix packages/backend -- --runInBand
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run build && npm test
scripts.verify:release: npm run verify && node scripts/check-production-readiness.mjs && npm audit --prefix packages/frontend --audit-level=moderate && npm audit --prefix packages/backend --audit-level=moderate
